species: Major vault protein is part of an extracellular cement material in the Atlantic salmon louse (Lepeophtheirus salmonis)
tissue: found to be highly expressed in cement, an extracellular material produced by a pair of cement glands in the adult female salmon louse.
sample_source: Tissues were dissected from adult female salmon lice.
sex: cement glands in the adult female salmon louse.
strain: Lepeophtheirus salmonis salmonis (LsGulen) strain was maintained on farmed Atlantic salmon...
